revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-2-245

The change in the correcting variable which is produced by the controlling equipment with a view to reducing the deviation resulting from a change in one or more actuating variables.

Reference: I.E.C.

{{IALAFooter}}
